entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Niulize swali moja linalonisaidia kuanza."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "Usinipe jibu la mwisho bado. Niulize ninadhani hatua ya kwanza ni nini."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Eleza kwa nini hatua hii inafanya kazi."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Nipe kidokezo, si jibu la mwisho."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Nipe tatizo linalofanana baada ya kulitatua hili."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Hili ndilo jibu langu. Linaonyesha dhana gani potofu?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Hili ndilo jaribio langu. Ni kidokezo gani kidogo zaidi kingesaidia?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Tengeneza tatizo la mazoezi linalofanana baada ya hili."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Nifanye nieleze wazo hilo kwa maneno yangu kabla hujaendelea."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "Nifanyie maswali kuhusu mada hii na usubiri jibu langu."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "Ni dhana gani potofu ingemfanya mtu atoe jibu langu lisilo sahihi?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: Jaribio rahisi

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: Mzunguko imara wa kusoma huonekana hivi:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI inaweza kukusaidia kujifunza haraka zaidi. Inaweza pia kukusaidia kukwepa kujifunza kabisa.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Omba kidokezo. Usiombe jibu la mwisho bado.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Omba kidokezo kidogo.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Iombe AI ikague hatua hiyo.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: Mwisho wa kipindi cha kusoma, jiulize maswali matatu:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza. Tumia dakika tatu kujaribu bila AI.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Epuka mtego wa kunakili

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Jenga mzunguko

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: Je, naweza kufanya mfano mpya?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: Je, naweza kueleza wazo bila kuangalia?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji mitiririko tofauti. Tumia kocha wa kazi za nyumbani kwa vidokezo, kocha wa hatua za hisabati kwa kutatua matatizo, mkufunzi wa Kisokrati kwa uelewa wa kina, flashcards kwa kukumbuka, na maswali kwa mazoezi yaliyopimwa kwa shinikizo.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Je, najua cha kufanya mazoezi baadaye?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Eleza hatua yako. Iambie AI kwa nini umechagua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Rekebisha dhana potofu.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Kwa uandishi, hilo linamaanisha kutumia Writing Coach kuboresha tasnifu, muundo, au aya huku ukihifadhi sauti yako. Kwa msimbo, linamaanisha kutumia Code Tutor kueleza makosa, kukuuliza utabiri matokeo, na kukusaidia kurekebisha badala ya kubandika suluhisho kamili. Kwa mitihani, linamaanisha kutumia Exam Prep Planner kuamua cha kurudia kwanza na jinsi ya kujipima.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: Vidokezo vizuri kwa kusoma kwa uaminifu

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Hili hapa toleo lenye nguvu kidogo zaidi unaloweza kutumia tena:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Jinsi ya kusoma na AI bila kujidanganya

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Ikiwa jibu ni ndiyo, AI ilikusaidia kusoma. Ikiwa jibu ni hapana, hatua inayofuata si kusoma zaidi. Ni mazoezi hai. Fungua Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, au maktaba ya vidokezo vya kujifunza kwa AI na ugeuze mada kuwa kazi unayopaswa kujaribu.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Ikiwa kazi ni ya nyumbani, anza katika Homework Coach. Ikiwa ni hisabati, tumia Math Step Coach na uiombe ikague hatua moja kwa wakati. Ikiwa unajaribu kuelewa dhana kwa kina, tumia Socratic Instruction na ujibu maswali kabla ya kuomba muhtasari.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Ukibandika swali la kazi ya nyumbani na kunakili jibu la mwisho, unaweza kumaliza kazi, lakini hujajenga ujuzi. Ukiomba kidokezo, kueleza mawazo yako, kulinganisha jibu lako, na kujaribu tatizo linalofanana, AI huwa mshirika wa kusoma badala ya njia ya mkato.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Fanya mazoezi ya toleo jipya.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Fanya mazoezi ya kuhamisha uelewa. Omba tatizo linalofanana lenye namba, maneno, au muktadha tofauti.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Kumbuka baadaye. Geuza sehemu dhaifu kuwa kadi katika Flashcard Builder au jaribio fupi katika Quiz Me On Trivia.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Omba uchunguzi. Uliza jibu lako linaonyesha nini kuhusu uelewa wako.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ujuzi wa kusoma

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Kusoma kwa kutumia AI hufanya kazi vizuri zaidi zana inapokuacha wewe kwenye kiti cha dereva.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Hiyo ni ishara ya tahadhari. Kutambua si kukumbuka. Kusoma maelezo yaliyo wazi si sawa na kuweza kutatua tatizo jipya, kuandika aya, au kujibu swali ukiwa chini ya shinikizo.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Mzunguko huo ni polepole kuliko kunakili, lakini ni wa haraka zaidi kuliko kubaki umechanganyikiwa.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Mtego wa kunakili ni wa hila. Hauhisi kila wakati kama kudanganya. Wakati mwingine huhisi kama kufanya kazi kwa ufanisi. AI hueleza kitu kwa uzuri, unatikisa kichwa, kisha unaendelea. Dakika kumi baadaye huwezi kuzalisha tena wazo bila jibu mbele yako.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Tofauti iko katika jinsi unavyoitumia.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Swali si kama AI inapaswa kuwa sehemu ya kusoma. Kwa wanafunzi wengi tayari ipo. Swali bora ni kama zana inakusaidia kujenga kumbukumbu, uamuzi, na kujiamini, au inaondoa kimya kimya jitihada ileile inayofanya kujifunza kushikamana.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Hatua ya kuhamisha uelewa ndiyo ufunguo. Ikiwa unaweza kutatua tu tatizo lilelile ambalo AI imekuongoza, umejifunza mfano. Ikiwa unaweza kutatua tatizo la aina inayofanana, unaanza kujifunza wazo.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Haya si maneno ya kichawi. Ni vizuizi vya usalama. Huweka mazungumzo yakilenga kufikiri badala ya kukusanya majibu.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Vidokezo hivi hukuweka hai. Hufanya AI iunge mkono hoja zako badala ya kuzibadilisha.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Jaribu vidokezo kama hivi:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Jaribu tatizo mwenyewe.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Tumia AI kama kocha wa kuelewa, kufanya mazoezi, na kupata mrejesho badala ya njia ya mkato inayoondoa kujifunza kimya kimya.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Tumia AI kwa kufikiri kuzunguka jibu

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Tumia vidokezo vinavyofanya AI ipunguze kasi:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Tumia hali sahihi

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Tumia kanuni hii: baada ya maelezo yoyote ya AI, funga mzunguko kwa kutoa kitu kutoka akili yako mwenyewe. Andika wazo tena. Tatua toleo jipya. Tengeneza flashcard. Lifundishe kwa mwanafunzi mdogo wa kufikirika. Omba jaribio. Kadiri kipindi kinavyokuomba uzalishe zaidi, ndivyo uwezekano wa kujidanganya unavyopungua.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Andika hatua yako inayofuata.
